name: Skyharbour Resources Ltd.
content: Skyharbour Resources is a Canadian uranium and thorium exploration company with an extensive portfolio of projects in the Athabasca Basin, Saskatchewan. The company employs a "prospect generator" model, advancing its secondary assets through partner-funded exploration while maintaining high-impact focus on its core projects, such as Moore Uranium and Russell Lake. Skyharbour provides investors with broad exposure to high-grade uranium targets in a premier mining jurisdiction.
